title: SINCELIGHT MR11 GU4 12V LED Small Spotlight Bulb Ø35mm Reflector, 3W, 280 Lumens, 25W Halogen Equivalent, 6000K (Cool White), High Color Rending RA≈92, 35°Beam Angle, Pack of 6
features: Energy-efficient replacement for halogen MR11 in size and shape(Ø35mm), The SINCELIGHT LED MR11 Reflector is energy-efficient with low wattage(3 Watt only), But its efficiency and performance certainly outperforms the traditional 25W halogen counterparts. Obviously it is one of the most effective replacements.

High Color Rending Index ( RA92 ), Be an excellent ambient light solution that provides realistic,natural and rich color.Suitable for use as ambient light to emphasise certain areas, the LED MR11 reflector is perfect for high-end residences, shops, restaurants, galleries, museums and other occasion where higher luminous effect is required.
No UV ( Ultraviolet ) and harmful blue light, more healthy and eyes protection, and protect the object being irradiated against fade and deteriorate.

Safty Working Voltage ( 12V AC/DC ), LED 12V Transformer is recommended as power supply of the LED MR11 bulb, Althought it suitable to work with more than 95% main brands of traditional transformer and pass compatibility testing. But it still have a certain proportion of incompatible possibility even in such a top level.
With Optical Lens of 38 Degree Beam Angle,provides an excellent spot, focus and precise lighting effect.
description: Product Description Electrical Date Working Voltage ( V ) 12V AC/DC Working Current ( mA ) 350mA Power Factor ( λ ) 0.7+ Starting Time ( Sec ) <0.5 Seconds Warm-up Time Instant full light 35° Beam Angle : Narrower Focus 35° Narrower Focusbeam of beam angles can provide you with concentrated light. It is the best choice for illuminating surfaces and emphasizes the smaller details in the room. It can be used downlights in the kitchen. You can also use this beam angle in rooms with higher ceilings like a study room or library. You can use this beam angle for ceilings over 9 feet and get a really nice light beam. This beam angle is also referred to as a spot. RA80+ ( 95% of MR11 Reflectors ) 80 basically meets the need for most indoor and business lighting occasion, 95% of GU10 Reflectors in the market are in this level. RA70+ ( Nonconforming MR11 ) A low CRI light source under the score of 80 which does not revel true colors, makes it hard to distinguish between colors, causing safety problems. Apart from that, people who are exposed to a poor light source are more apt to have eye fatigue, headaches and dissatisfied working performance.
